_doc: S&P 100 (OEX) constituents — the curated screener universe. Every ticker here is pre-analyzed nightly so the screener returns instant results. Researched-but-not-listed tickers live on the Research page only and do not appear in the screener. List is a static snapshot; review and update periodically (S&P revises constituents a few times per year). Last reviewed: 2026-05.
_dual_class_policy: When a company has multiple share classes in the index (Alphabet GOOG/GOOGL, Berkshire BRK.A/BRK.B), we list only one ticker per company. FMP's per-class market_cap is inconsistent for these (GOOG returns ~2x GOOGL's market cap despite identical fundamentals), which would distort every price-derived metric. Picked GOOGL (Class A, voting) and BRK.B (lower-priced, more retail-tradeable) as the canonical tickers.
